text: x gdal_opts() object (character vector / list, passed ). ... Passed methods. cli Logical; emit interleaved CLI tokens (TRUE, default) bare KEY=VALUE vector. long Logical; use long flag names (--open-option) rather aliases (--oo). with_format Logical; prepend --input-format/--output-format flag driver known (open/creation ).

title: Convert GDAL Options to Algorithm Arguments — as_gdal_args
text: repeated options (--oo/--co/--lco), GDAL requires value preceded flag - values never comma-packed (packed value corrupt options PRELUDE_STATEMENTS contain ;/,). Accordingly: cli = TRUE (default) emits flat token vector c("--open-option", "K=V", "--open-option", "K2=V2", ...), suitable args gdalraster::gdal_alg(). cli = FALSE emits unnamed c("K=V", ...) vector, suitable single alg$setArg(<flag>, .) call.

title: FlatGeobuf Creation Options — fgb_creation_opts
text: spatial_index Value SPATIAL_INDEX. Logical TRUE/FALSE (coerced "YES"/"") controlling whether packed Hilbert R-tree spatial index written. GDAL default "YES". temporary_dir Value TEMPORARY_DIR (path existing directory temporary files; used SPATIAL_INDEX = TRUE. "/vsimem/" may used -memory temporaries). title Value TITLE (GDAL >= 3.9); dataset title (relatively short). description Value DESCRIPTION (GDAL >= 3.9); dataset description (free-form long text). ... Additional NAME = value options passed verbatim alongside typed arguments. coerced validated driver metadata way, take precedence typed argument sets option. .set_defaults Logical. TRUE, options left unset (NULL) filled driver's documented GDAL metadata defaults (via relevant gdal_vector_driver_*_opts_defaults()); user-supplied values always take precedence. Defaults FALSE.

YES, tables including listed gpkg_contents listed, cases. , tables registered 'features', 'attributes' 'aspatial' listed. PRELUDE_STATEMENTS=[SQL]: (GDAL >= 3.2) SQL statement(s) send SQLite3 connection ones. case several statements, must separated semicolon (;) sign. option may useful attach another database current one issue cross-database requests. NOLOCK=[YES/]: (GDAL >= 3.4.2) Defaults . Whether database used without file locking. Setting YES honored opening read-mode journal mode WAL. corresponds nolock=1 query parameter described https://www.sqlite.org/uri.html. IMMUTABLE=[YES/]: (GDAL >= 3.5.3) Whether database opened assuming file modified another process. skip checks change detection. can useful WAL enabled files read-storage. GDAL automatically try turn able open read-mode WAL enabled file. corresponds immutable=1 query parameter described https://www.sqlite.org/uri.html.

title: GeoParquet Creation Options — gpq_creation_opts
text: compression Value COMPRESSION. One NONE/SNAPPY/GZIP/BROTLI/ZSTD/ LZ4_RAW/LZ4_HADOOP (available values depend Parquet library built). GDAL default "SNAPPY" available, otherwise NONE. compression_level Value COMPRESSION_LEVEL (GDAL >= 3.12). Codec-dependent integer. geometry_encoding Value GEOMETRY_ENCODING. One WKB/WKT/GEOARROW/ GEOARROW_INTERLEAVED. GDAL default "WKB" (recommended interoperability). row_group_size Value ROW_GROUP_SIZE (maximum rows per group). GDAL default 65536. geometry_name Value GEOMETRY_NAME. GDAL default "geometry". fid Value FID (name FID column create; unset, FID column created). polygon_orientation Value POLYGON_ORIENTATION. One COUNTERCLOCKWISE/ UNMODIFIED. GDAL default "COUNTERCLOCKWISE". edges Value EDGES. One PLANAR/SPHERICAL. GDAL default "PLANAR". creator Value CREATOR (name creating application). write_covering_bbox Value WRITE_COVERING_BBOX (GDAL >= 3.9). One AUTO/YES/(logical coerced); write per-row xmin/ymin/xmax/ymax bounding-box columns faster spatial filtering. GDAL default "AUTO". covering_bbox_name Value COVERING_BBOX_NAME (GDAL >= 3.13). Defaults geometry column name suffixed _bbox. use_parquet_geo_types Value USE_PARQUET_GEO_TYPES (GDAL >= 3.12; requires libarrow >= 21). One YES//. GDAL default "". sort_by_bbox Value SORT_BY_BBOX (GDAL >= 3.9; logical -> "YES"/""). Spatially order features (via temporary GeoPackage) faster spatial filtering. GDAL default "". timestamp_with_offset Value TIMESTAMP_WITH_OFFSET (GDAL >= 3.13). One AUTO/YES/. GDAL default "AUTO". coordinate_precision Value COORDINATE_PRECISION (number decimals coordinates; GEOMETRY_ENCODING=WKT). ... Additional NAME = value options passed verbatim alongside typed arguments. coerced validated driver metadata way, take precedence typed argument sets option. .set_defaults Logical. TRUE, options left unset (NULL) filled driver's documented GDAL metadata defaults (via relevant gdal_vector_driver_*_opts_defaults()); user-supplied values always take precedence. Defaults FALSE.
